rows.label: qev025306_MSG0001
rows.name: Welcome! Welcome to the Sunshine Cafe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025306_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Eh, what's that? You're looking
for food unique to NLA? Then how
about our pride and joy, the Hotdog?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025306_MSG0003
rows.name:
It stays piping hot and spicy
forever! And all for just 600G![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025306_SEL0021
rows.name: Decline, saying you don't need it.

rows.label: qev025306_MSG0004
rows.name:
Thank you! Here you go! This is sure to
make even an alien's cheeks melt off.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025306_MSG0005
rows.name:
Oh? But it's so delicious... Come buy
one if you change your mind, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025306_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Hm? Uh, do you happen
to not have enough money?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025306_MSG0007
rows.name:
It's definitely worth the 600G!
Come back when you have the money![ST:wait ]
